arts.ttl: Companies House document emerges as West Ham's London Stadium changes ownership
arts.sum: West Ham United’s home ground London Stadium has undergone major changes behind the scenes. The Irons have been playing at the former Olympic Stadium for... The post Companies House document emerges as West Ham's London Stadium changes ownership appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Antoine Semenyo attracting Premier League interest ahead of expected Bournemouth exodus
arts.sum: The 25-year-old is being scouted by Liverpool, Arsenal and Manchester United as the Cherries attempt to hold on to their key personnel

A 1-0 loss at Wolves means West Ham have now failed to win their last three, losing twice in that run. The Hammers have won three of their last four home meetings with Bournemouth, which bodes well as...

arts.ttl: Todibo and Kudus back in training ahead of Bournemouth
arts.sum: We'll see how he reacts today - we've got another training session on Friday so there's a chance he'll be involved, which would be good for us. Elsewhere, Potter revealed he will take a check on Emerson too for a knock picked up at Molineux, but he is expecting everyone other than long-term injury absentees Michail Antonio and Crysencio Summerville to be available to face the Cherries.
